summary: Phase 5 - Dashboard Refonte Testing Complete. Both Vendor and Driver dashboards have been completely redesigned with full sidebar navigation similar to Admin. All navigation items working, Google Maps integration functional, status selector operational.

minor.issue: WebSocket connection closes before establishment (non-blocking, reconnects automatically)

issues: Google Maps shows deprecation warning for google.maps.Marker (recommended to migrate to AdvancedMarkerElement)

passed_tests: Vendor Dashboard - Login with testvendor@cloleo.com / test123
Vendor Dashboard - Sidebar navigation with 7 items (Tableau de bord, Mes produits, Commandes, Suivi livraisons, Statistiques, Mon abonnement, Paramètres)
Vendor Dashboard - All sidebar navigation items clickable and functional
Vendor Dashboard - Tracking section with Google Maps placeholder
Vendor Dashboard - Dashboard section with stats, subscription banner, product status
Vendor Dashboard - Products section with product list
Vendor Dashboard - Orders section with order table
Vendor Dashboard - Subscription section with plan details
Vendor Dashboard - Statistics section with sales/product stats
Vendor Dashboard - Settings section with shop info
Driver Dashboard - Login with testdriver@cloleo.com / driver123
Driver Dashboard - Sidebar navigation with 5 items (Carte & Navigation, Commandes, Historique, Mes gains, Mon profil)
Driver Dashboard - Status selector (Disponible/Occupé/Hors ligne) working
Driver Dashboard - Status change to 'Disponible' triggers GPS tracking
Driver Dashboard - Google Maps integration showing driver position
Driver Dashboard - Available orders list with Accept buttons
Driver Dashboard - Order acceptance workflow (Accept → Récupérer colis)
Driver Dashboard - Active order card with customer details and map
Driver Dashboard - Map shows customer destination marker (red)
Driver Dashboard - 'Ouvrir dans Google Maps' link for navigation
Driver Dashboard - Profile section with driver info
Driver Dashboard - Sidebar collapse/expand toggle working
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Consider migrating from deprecated google.maps.Marker to google.maps.marker.AdvancedMarkerElement (not urgent, deprecation notice only)
Minor: useEffect dependency warnings in both dashboard files (react-hooks/exhaustive-deps) - functional but could be cleaned up
seed_data_creation: Used existing test orders for driver acceptance workflow testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard refonte complete. Vendor Dashboard has full sidebar with 7 sections including Suivi livraisons with Google Maps. Driver Dashboard has 5 sections with status selector (Disponible/Occupé/Hors ligne), Google Maps navigation, and order acceptance workflow. Both dashboards use data-testid attributes for navigation items (nav-dashboard, nav-products, nav-orders, nav-tracking, nav-stats, nav-subscription, nav-settings for Vendor; nav-map, nav-orders, nav-history, nav-stats, nav-profile for Driver). WebSocket reconnection works automatically despite initial connection warnings.
